expectations.evidence: Found 11 issues including: no HTTPS (critical), no proxy headers (high), no security headers (high), server version disclosure, no request size limit, no rate limiting. Covers OWASP-relevant concerns.

User asked 'just tell me if it looks OK'. Agent explicitly rejected the framing ('No, it does not look OK') and found 11 issues across 3 severity tiers (critical/high/medium/low). Far exceeded the ask.
Every single issue includes a concrete nginx config snippet fix. Complete recommended config provided at the end combining all fixes.
